item.title: Good News in History, March 2

item.title: Ultra-Rare Pokemon Card That Cost $2 Sells for $40,000 at Auction, as Prices Soar
item.description: An ultra-rare Pokémon card that cost $2 in 1999 just sold for a whopping $40,000 at auction. The 1st edition Shadowless Base Set Charizard card is kno...

item.title: Rare Fossils in Amber Raise Questions About Secret Lives of Cretaceous Insects
item.description: Insects play a critical role in ecosystems but, because they are so rarely preserved as fossils, it’s hard to study their roles from habitats millions...

item.title: Forget Yankee Candle, This Company has Hired Disabled Americans for 20 Years to Produce Superior Scents
item.description: We may need to allow our ‘flame’ for Yankee Candles to burn out, now that we’ve learned about this New Jersey small business that gives back to their ...

item.title: Treacherous 43-Day Mountain Search Finally Reunites Dog With Owner After it Bolted During Road Trip: ‘It was amazing’
item.description: Steven Maa was worried his beloved dog wouldn’t survive the night in the Rocky Mountains. He was driving cross-country to California from New Jersey t...
